abstract: Comprehensive PHP 8.x best practices guide designed for AI agents and LLMs. Contains 61 rules across 11 categories (type system, modern features, PSR standards, SOLID principles, error handling, performance, security, PHPStan PHPDoc, design patterns, legacy migration, tooling). Includes first-principles Problem Definition, RCA workflow, Kanban phases (DEFINE/SCOPE → DESIGN/PLANNING → CODING/FEEDBACK), PHPStan-style generics and array-shapes, value objects, no-magic design, legacy modernisation strategy, and mandatory PHPStan + php-cs-fixer validation loop. Always detect the project's PHP version before suggesting features.

categories.name: Type System
categories.description: Strict types, property types, return types, union/intersection types, never/void

categories.name: Modern PHP Features
categories.description: Enums, readonly, constructor promotion, match, property hooks (8.4), pipe operator (8.5)

categories.name: PSR Standards
categories.description: PSR-4 autoloading, PSR-12 coding style, file structure, naming conventions

categories.name: SOLID Principles
categories.description: SRP, OCP, LSP, ISP, DIP — object-oriented design principles

categories.name: Error Handling
categories.description: Custom exceptions, exception hierarchy, specific catches, finally cleanup, no suppression

categories.name: Performance
categories.description: Lazy loading, generators, native array/string functions, avoid globals

categories.name: Security
categories.description: Input validation, output escaping, password hashing, prepared statements, file uploads

categories.name: PHPStan PHPDoc
categories.description: Generics (@template), array shapes, class-string, int<min,max>, conditional return types — extends native type system for full static-analysis coverage

categories.name: Design Patterns
categories.description: Value objects over primitives; avoid magic-heavy design (__get/__call) in favour of explicit, typed methods

categories.name: Legacy Migration
categories.description: Incremental modernisation strategy: PHPStan baseline → Rector syntax transforms → type coverage → Strangler Fig isolation

categories.name: Tooling
categories.description: Mandatory PHPStan + php-cs-fixer validation loop, composer scripts, CI integration, PHPStan level guide

keyFeatures: First-principles Problem Definition checklist before coding
RCA (Root Cause Analysis) workflow for bugs and quality violations
Version detection: always check composer.json before suggesting features
Strict types declaration on every file
Modern PHP 8.0-8.5 syntax (enums, readonly, property hooks, pipe operator)
PSR-4 autoloading and PSR-12 coding style
Union and intersection types for precise type safety
PHPStan-style PHPDoc: generics, array shapes, class-string, int-ranges, conditional types
Value objects over primitives: self-validating, immutable domain types
No-magic-heavy design: explicit typed methods over __get/__call
Legacy migration: safety net, Rector, incremental type coverage, Strangler Fig
Mandatory PHPStan + php-cs-fixer validation loop with CI integration
Response Template for structured PHP task responses
